message:
style(http,ui): remove trailing whitespace and adjust overseer indicator dot size

## Changes

1. **src/mcp_agent_mail/http.py** - Removed trailing whitespace on lines 1258-1259 (after `logging.error` and `return` statements)

2. **src/mcp_agent_mail/templates/mail_project.html** - Minor visual adjustment to overseer button indicator:
   - Changed size from `w-2 h-2` to `w-3 h-3` (8px → 12px for better visibility)
   - Adjusted position from `-top-0.5 -right-0.5` to `-top-1 -right-1` (centered with larger size)
   - Updated comment text for clarity

These are cosmetic-only changes with no functional impact.

---

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
